hooks.commandWindows: powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = (& git rev-parse --show-toplevel).Trim(); if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; & node (Join-Path $root 'dist/hooks/orchestration-codex.js'); exit $LASTEXITCODE"

powershell -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = (& git rev-parse --show-toplevel).Trim(); if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; & node (Join-Path $root 'dist/hooks/orchestration-codex.js'); exit $LASTEXITCODE"
